reasoning: The control 10.3.2 focuses on examining system configurations and privileges, which aligns with ensuring that Kubernetes audit logging is enabled and properly configured. This ensures that all actions and changes within the cluster are logged and can be reviewed, similar to how cloud providers log access and configuration changes. Kubernetes audit logs can be configured to capture metadata and ensure retention policies are in place, which parallels cloud audit logging requirements.
